data.name: Axelrod
data.description: Axelrod is the premier on-chain swap execution agent on the Base chain, engineered for stability, reliability, speed, cost and precision. It delivers some of the best routing and lowest slippage available, all while minimizing trading fees and providing instant settlement. Buy or sell tokens instantly with lowest slippage possible. Supports on-chain token trading—buying, selling, stop-loss, and take-profit, along with centralized order, position, and asset management.

jobs.name: open_position
jobs.description: Open a spot position on Axelrod (Note: No leverage, Base and Sol Chain only)

price.description: Triggered based on absolute price value

percentage.description: Triggered based on percentage price change

sl.description: Stop loss information,This is an optional field and need not to request from user if not provided

price.description: Triggered based on absolute price value

percentage.description: Triggered based on percentage price change

tp.description: Profit-taking information,This is an optional field and need not to request from user if not provided

amount.description: Transaction amounts are typically denominated in USDC.

symbol.description: The name of the target, for example, $AXR.  This is an optional field and need not to request from user if not provided `contractAddress` and `symbol` cannot both be empty. If `contractAddress` exists, it takes precedence.

contractAddress.description: The target address, for example: 0x58db197e91bc8cf1587f75850683e4bd0730e6bf This is an optional field and need not to request from user if not provided `contractAddress` and `symbol` cannot both be empty. If `contractAddress` exists, it takes precedence.

jobs.name: close_position

amount.description: The amount received from closing a position is usually denominated in USDC.

jobs.description: Close a spot position on Axelrod

positionId.description: Active position-id. All active position-ids can be retrieved using the `get_active_positions` tool.

jobs.name: swap_token
jobs.description: Swap any Base token with Axelrod. (Note: to define the fromtoken and totoken.

amount.description: Transaction amounts refer to the requested token quantity

toSymbol.description: Transaction target currency name This is an optional field and need not to request from user if not provided `toSymbol` and `toContractAddress` cannot both be empty. If `toContractAddress` exists, it takes precedence.

fromSymbol.description: Payment currency name This is an optional field and need not to request from user if not provided `fromSymbol` and `fromContractAddress` cannot both be empty. If `fromContractAddress` exists, it takes precedence.

toContractAddress.description: Transaction target currency address This is an optional field and need not to request from user if not provided `toContractAddress` and `toSymbol` cannot both be empty. If `toContractAddress` exists, it takes precedence.

fromContractAddress.description: Payment currency address This is an optional field and need not to request from user if not provided `fromContractAddress` and `fromSymbol` cannot both be empty. If `fromContractAddress` exists, it takes precedence.

jobs.name: stake
jobs.description: Stake funds into the Axelrod USDC Vault and earn a fixed 9% APY, with yield calculated in real time. The Maximum capped at 500,000 USDC.

symbol.description: only support USDC now,The name of the token, for example, $USDC.  This is an optional field and need not to request from user if not provided `contractAddress` and `symbol` cannot both be empty. If `contractAddress` exists, it takes precedence.

contractAddress.description: The address of the token, for example: 0x58db197e91bc8cf1587f75850683e4bd0730e6bf This is an optional field and need not to request from user if not provided `contractAddress` and `symbol` cannot both be empty. If `contractAddress` exists, it takes precedence.

jobs.name: redeem
jobs.description: Redeem funds from the Axelrod USDC Vault. Yield stops instantly. Principal plus accrued yield will be sent to your Butler Wallet.

orderId.description: The order ID that needs to be redeemed can be retrieved using the `get_staking_orders` resource.

jobs.name: auto_trade_stop
jobs.description: Stop a running automated trading order

orderId.description: Automated order ID to stop (from auto_trade_place result)

resources.name: get_stake_summary
resources.description: Retrieve the stake summary for Axelrod USDC Vaults including total staked amount in the vaults and stake limit.

resources.name: get_auto_trades
resources.description: Get user's auto trade orders list

resources.name: get_auto_trade_detail
resources.description: Get user's auto trade order detail by orderId

resources.name: get_future_positions
resources.description: Query all futures positions for current wallet

resources.name: get_future_position_detail
resources.description: Query single futures position detail by symbol for current wallet

resources.name: get_future_account
resources.description: Query futures account summary for current wallet

resources.name: get_future_pending_orders
resources.description: Query current pending futures orders for current wallet

resources.name: get_future_order_detail
resources.description: Query futures order detail by orderId for current wallet
